name: Greek Eggs Kayana
method: In a saucepan, stir in the olive oil.
Stir in the diced cloves and sauté for two minutes over medium-high
Put some tomatoes. With salt and black pepper, mix.
Spray 1 tablespoon of oregano over everything.
Stir in the tomatoes and fry for 5-6 minutes, stirring regularly.
To the pot, add the egg mixture and gently blend it.
Stir in the tomatoes and egg combination three times.
Cook the eggs according to the texture you like.
Serve instantly with a swirl of hot chili flakes, a crumbled feta cheese,
If you like, add some chopped herbs, such as mint or basil.
